headlines.title: U.S., Israel and Iran Agree to Two-Week Ceasefire Before Trump Strait Deadline
headlines.summary: U.S., Israel and Iran agree to two-week ceasefire after Iran's 10-point proposal, just before Trump's deadline to reopen Strait of Hormuz. Affects global shipping and energy; oil prices drop 15%. Paves way for talks, averting wider war.

framings.angle: Reports deal came shortly before Trump’s Hormuz reopening deadline; Israel excludes Lebanon
Covers Trump pulling back from destruction threats after Iran’s 10-point proposal
Notes Iran’s two-week Hormuz safe passage if attacks halt; Israel excludes Lebanon
Details Iran’s 10-point plan for war end; Trump calls it workable despite issues
Highlights up to 15% crude oil price plunge on ceasefire and Hormuz reopening

headlines.title: Rwanda-Backed Rebels Enter Goma Overrunning Troops with One Million Displaced
headlines.summary: Rwanda-backed rebels overrun Congolese troops entering Goma, Congo's aid hub; gunfire reported with over one million displaced inside city. U.N. warns of humanitarian crisis. Threatens regional stability and aid operations.

headlines.title: Ukraine Strikes Russian Oil Refineries and Shipping to Curb War Revenue
headlines.summary: Ukraine ramps up attacks on Russian oil facilities as Iran war boosts Moscow's crude revenue funding Ukraine invasion. Targets refining and exports. Aims to weaken Russia's war economy amid global energy shifts.

headlines.title: SpaceX Launches Crew-10 with Four Astronauts to Retrieve NASA's Stuck ISS Pair
headlines.summary: SpaceX Falcon 9 launches NASA’s Anne McClain, Nichole Ayers, Japan’s Takuya Onishi and Russia’s Kirill Peskov from Florida to ISS. Enables return of stuck astronauts Wilmore and Williams after nine months. Restores normal rotations.

headlines.title: Rex Heuermann Agrees to Plead Guilty in Long Island Gilgo Beach Killings
headlines.summary: Long Island architect Rex Heuermann, charged in Gilgo Beach serial killings, will plead guilty Wednesday. Ends years-long probe haunting investigators and victims' families. Closes notorious U.S. true-crime case.

headlines.title: North Korea Fires Several Short-Range Missiles Toward Sea After South Korea Taunts
headlines.summary: North Korea launches several short-range missiles into sea from east coast after ridiculing South’s inter-Korean ties hopes. Heightens peninsula tensions amid global conflicts. Signals rejection of dialogue.

headlines.title: UK Prime Minister Starmer Urges Russia to Yield in Ukraine Ceasefire Push
headlines.summary: British PM Keir Starmer tells virtual coalition of leaders Russia must engage Ukraine ceasefire talks sooner or later. Excludes U.S.; aims to end three-year war. Bolsters European pressure on Moscow.

headlines.title: Palestinians Stream into Northern Gaza After Israel Breaks Hostage Deadlock
headlines.summary: Israel allows thousands of displaced Palestinians to cross bisecting military zone into north Gaza after hostage release impasse ends. Eases humanitarian plight for returnees. Signals potential de-escalation steps.
headlines.previousContext: Israel opens military zone yesterday; today thousands return after hostage release deadlock broken

headlines.title: NATO Launches First Coordinated Response After Second Baltic Sea Cable Cut
headlines.summary: NATO deploys first coordinated action against suspected sabotage after another deep-sea cable severed in Baltic Sea. Protects critical infrastructure. Raises hybrid threat concerns from Russia.
headlines.previousContext: First cable severance prompted initial response yesterday; today second cut triggers full NATO coordination
